name: Дніпро / Dnipro
author: ahkimn

# Дніпро (Dnipro) ### DNK · v0.1.1 Part of the [EU Map Pack](https://ahkimn.github.io/subwaybuilder-eu-maps). Highly-detailed map of the Дніпро (Dnipro) metropolitan region using pre-Feb-2022 Ukrainian government statistics. ![Map Coverage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/registry/refs/heads/main/maps/yukina-ua-dnipro/gallery/preview.webp) ## Coverage

## Additional Features - **Building Collision** — A buildings index is included for all non-filtered buildings, each carrying a per-building foundation depth in in-game meters. Depths scale with building height and footprint width and are bounded to the **−10 m** to **−80 m** range: single-family homes and low-rise structures anchor at the floor, while supertall towers with deep bedrock piles (Taipei-101 class) reach the cap. Freestanding towers, masts, chimneys, and other slender non-occupiable structures are detected by shape and floored to the **−10 m** minimum. Foundation depths drive underground tunnel-clearance collision and are also emitted as a visual `foundations` pmtiles layer visible on the in-game map. Building footprints come from Overture Maps Foundation with height estimation via the GHS-BUILT-V non-residential volume raster + GHS-BUILT-H height raster. - **Water Depth Index** — A water depth index restricts track placement in inland water bodies (rivers, lakes, reservoirs) using a flat **−5 m** index that prevents surface-level track placement. _Coastal bathymetry (Black Sea + Sea of Azov) is scheduled for a future v2 update once an offshore depth source is registered._ - **Place Name Labels** — Two layers of place name labels are embedded in the map: - _City labels_ — Oblast capitals and other major Ukrainian cities at the metropolitan scale. - _Hromada labels_ — Names of all _територіальні громади_ (consolidated territorial communities) within the map boundary. ## Methodology This map is generated through a six-phase pipeline that transforms Ukrainian government census and employment statistics into georeferenced origin/destination demand points. **Point Seeding:** Candidate points are placed within each _територіальна громада_ (consolidated territorial community / hromada) using population-weighted centroids derived from a hybrid 100 m / 250 m mesh — the JRC GHS-POP 2020 raster gated by a residential building mask built from GHS-BUILT-V non-residential volume + Overture building footprints + WorldCover land cover + GULU R2025 urban land-use classification. Per-hromada population anchors come from Держстат _Чисельність наявного населення України_ (zb_Nas projected to 2021 from the 2001 All-Ukrainian Population Census). **Mesh Reconciliation:** Initial point populations are refined by solving a constrained convex optimization that approximates each point's mass to residential and economic mesh ideals while preserving Держстат per-hromada population totals. **Aggregation:** A per-oblast scaling factor reconciles the universe mismatch between residence-side employment and workplace-side employment. The per-hromada workplace control total uses Держстат _Робоча сила України 2021_ (the Ukrainian Labour Force Survey, which captures both formal and informal employment cohorts at oblast grain). NACE-section breakdowns are used to disaggregate oblast employment to per-hromada workplace shares via the GHS-BUILT-V non-residential volume mask + GULU industrial/commercial/educational class signals + the MBK (_Місцевий будівельний кадастр_) functional-zoning overlay where available (currently Kyiv only). **Commute Assignment:** No measured per-hromada O/D matrix is publicly available for Ukraine. Commute flows are assigned using a gravity model with synthetic O/D priors derived cross-country from PL gmina-level commute survey data and JP municipality-level commute matrices, scaled to UA per-hromada `econ_workers` mass. A continuous boundary-dilution adjustment (`phase_d.boundary_dilution`) reduces the synthetic self-loop share on hromadas near the bundle exterior, accounting for the fact that cordon-edge hromadas have higher out-of-bundle commute fractions than interior ones (analogous to the PL §ii recovery profile, exponential dilution with max_pp=20 / e_fold_km=30). **Special Demand Injection:** Non-commuter demand generators — airports, ports, universities — are injected as an additive layer. Airport demand from Державіаслужба України (State Aviation Service) 2019 throughput statistics — pre-COVID + pre-invasion peak across 10 civilian airports. Port demand from АМПУ (Адміністрація морських портів України) 2019 passenger throughput for the 4 Black Sea passenger terminals (Odesa Морвокзал, Odesa Ferry Terminal, Chornomorsk, Pivdennyi). University demand from the ЄДЕБО (Єдина державна електронна база з питань освіти) open-data registry for the 449 active higher-education institutions UA-wide, with coords resolved via a 3-tier cascade: operator-finalised → Overture Places POI fuzzy-match → ADM4 settlement-centroid placeholder. _Hospital, military, and tourism-attraction demand generators are scheduled for future Phase E expansion releases._ **Layout Reconciliation:** A final spatial pass resolves point overlaps and ensures map clickability while keeping special-demand locations fixed. ## Data Sources All demand modeling is derived from freely available Ukrainian government statistical datasets and public geospatial resources. ### Census & Demographics - **2001 All-Ukrainian Population Census** (Всеукраїнський перепис населення 2001 — per-settlement population baseline; projected to 2021 via Держстат annual updates) — [Держстат](https://www.ukrcensus.gov.ua/) - **Annual Population Estimates** (_Чисельність наявного населення України / zb_Nas_ — per-oblast and per-hromada annual stocks updated by Держстат) — [Держстат](https://www.ukrstat.gov.ua/) - **Labour Force Survey** (_Робоча сила України 2021_ / Robocha Sila — oblast employment by NACE section, captures formal + informal cohorts) — [Держстат](https://www.ukrstat.gov.ua/) - **NACE Sectoral Employment** (per-oblast 2021 employment by NACE A through S — Table 2.2 of Robocha Sila 2021 annual) — [Держстат](https://www.ukrstat.gov.ua/) ### Geospatial Reference - **OCHA COD-AB Administrative Boundaries** (UA admin0/1/2/3/4 — oblast / raion / hromada / settlement polygons published by the UN OCHA Common Operational Datasets programme) — [OCHA HDX](https://data.humdata.org/dataset/cod-ab-ukr) - **KATOTTH Codifier** (Кодифікатор адміністративно-територіальних одиниць та територій територіальних громад — the Ukrainian admin-unit codification system that replaced the legacy KOATUU classifier in 2020) — [Cabinet of Ministers / decree №2660-IX](https://www.kmu.gov.ua/) - **100 m Population Grid** (GHS-POP R2023A) — [JRC / EU Copernicus](https://ghsl.jrc.ec.europa.eu/) - **100 m Built-Volume Rasters** (GHS-BUILT-V non-residential volume + GHS-BUILT-H height, R2023A) — [JRC / EU Copernicus](https://ghsl.jrc.ec.europa.eu/) - **WorldCover Land Cover** (ESA WorldCover 2021 v200 — 10 m global land-cover classification, used for residential-mask refinement) — [ESA WorldCover](https://esa-worldcover.org/) - **GULU R2025** (Global Urban Land Use 100 m raster — residential / industrial / commercial / educational / farmland class labels) — [GULU project](https://daac.ornl.gov/) - **Overture Maps Foundation** (building footprints + Places POIs — used for residential mask v3.8 rescue tier and Phase E Overture POI auto-geocoding) — [Overture](https://overturemaps.org/) - **MBK Functional Zoning** (_Місцевий будівельний кадастр_ — per-oblast ArcGIS REST functional-zoning extracts spec-aligned to Order №56; currently Kyiv + Dnipro coverage) — [Mistorobudivnyi Kadastr](https://mbk.minregion.gov.ua/) ### Special Demand Statistics (Phase E) - **Airport Passenger Statistics** (Держававіаслужба України / State Aviation Service annual report — per-airport passenger throughput, **2019 pre-invasion baseline**) — [Держававіаслужба](https://avia.gov.ua/pro-nas/statistika/) · cross-reference [Wikipedia uk:Пасажиропотік аеропортів України](https://uk.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%9F%D0%B0%D1%81%D0%B0%D0%B6%D0%B8%D1%80%D0%BE%D0%BF%D0%BE%D1%82%D1%96%D0%BA_%D0%B0%D0%B5%D1%80%D0%BE%D0%BF%D0%BE%D1%80%D1%82%D1%96%D0%B2_%D0%A3%D0%BA%D1%80%D0%B0%D1%97%D0%BD%D0%B8) - **Port Passenger Statistics** (АМПУ / Адміністрація морських портів України annual report — per-terminal annual passenger throughput, **2019 pre-invasion baseline**) — [АМПУ Open Data](https://www.uspa.gov.ua/) - **University Registry** (ЄДЕБО / Єдина державна електронна база з питань освіти — Ministry of Education's open-data registry of accredited tertiary institutions; institutional metadata: name, EDRPOU code, KATOTTH location, ownership form, founding year, parent-institution code for branch detection) — [ЄДЕБО Registry API](https://registry.edbo.gov.ua/api/opendata/universities/) - **University Enrollment — 5-tier cascade** (per-institution `total_enrollment`, sourced via priority cascade for breadth across the ~450 in-scope tertiary institutions): **Tier 0** operator-curated overrides (`ua_university_geocode_overrides.csv`); **Tier 1** curated counts from [Wikipedia uk + en](https://uk.wikipedia.org/) infoboxes + archival web search for marquee institutions (~140 entries) + selective [osvita.ua](https://osvita.ua/vnz/guide/) `Кількість студентів` triangulation + [education.ua](https://www.education.ua/universities/) post-merger values; **Tier 1.5** MES admissions cohort estimate from [data.gov.ua dataset 8f7d7ba2](https://data.gov.ua/dataset/8f7d7ba2-1d1f-4de8-a105-660fb5ebb01a) "Дані щодо фактичного прийому за спеціальностями у закладах вищої освіти" — cycle-length-weighted sum of 2017-2020 admissions per qualification (Бакалавр × 4, Магістр × 1.5, Спеціаліст × 5, etc., from Ministry of Education open-data CSV, CC BY licensed; covers ~265 unknowns); **Tier 4** uniform default placeholder (=1, marker only); plus **operator_skip** entries (`total_enrollment=0`) for defense/security with classified cadet counts, branches whose parent already accounts for demand, and small private/religious institutions below the noise floor. Vintage: **2017-2020 pre-invasion baseline**. - **University POI Geocoding** (Overture Maps Foundation Places — `college_university` / `education` / `campus_building` categories matched per-institution by fuzzy name × confidence, Tier 2 of the coord cascade; Tier 3 falls back to OCHA ADM4 settlement centroid; Tier 4 to ADM1 oblast centroid for name-variant misses) — [Overture Places](https://overturemaps.org/) - _Hospital, military, attractions / tourism, and convention-centre demand sources will be added in future Phase E expansion releases. The CSV scaffolds for these categories ship empty in v1 with documented loader hooks (see `source_data/ua/NOTES.md`)._ ## Wartime caveat This map reflects **pre-Feb-2022 conditions** — the last full year of peacetime operations before the Russian full-scale invasion. Current operational realities (closed civilian airports, displaced populations, occupied territories, port operations restricted to the Black Sea grain corridor) are **NOT modeled**. The pipeline's vintage policy explicitly forbids consuming post-invasion statistics for Phase E demand generation. The following territories are **excluded entirely** (no demand points, no boundary inclusion) by hard policy: - **Crimea** — `adm1_pcode` `UA01` (Автономна Республіка Крим) + `UA85` (Севастополь). Occupied since 2014; not under government control pre-Feb-2022. - **Pre-2022 occupied Donbas** — portions of `UA14` (Donetska oblast) and `UA44` (Luhanska oblast) controlled by separatist authorities since 2014. The pre-2022 government-controlled portions of these oblasts (Mariupol, Sloviansk, Kramatorsk, Severodonetsk, Lysychansk) are policy-eligible — but none of these cities are currently in the bundle set, so the carve-out is academic for v1. ## License This map data is released under the [GNU General Public License v3.0](https://github.com/ahkimn/subwaybuilder-eu-maps/blob/main/LICENSE). ## Credits Map authored by [Yukina-](https://subwaybuildermodded.com/credits/)
